title: Alpha_666.exe
description: This mod is based of a old creepypasta
body:
# **Alpha_666**

##  He Watches
Hi! This mod is inspired by the classic alpha_666.exe creepypasta. It aims to add a bit of mystery and suspense to your gameplay.

I recommend playing this mod with - [https://modrinth.com/mod/moderner-beta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moderner-beta)

Current Features:
- 1 New Entity
- 4 Random Events

Future Plans:
I am currently working on a new version of a mod that will expand the it significantly. The upcoming version will include:

- More Entities
- Structures
- More Events
